summary.baselineLoad: added deterministic baseline load suite against training, observability and alert endpoints with p95 latency guardrails and zero 5xx expectation
summary.stressLoad: added mixed stress suite with concurrent crash/analytics/summary traffic validating controlled behavior and zero server-error responses
summary.controlledDegradation: stress scenario now validates operational degradation signals (fatal crash, denied access and blocked actions) with runbook linkage and support incident impact
summary.runtimeObservability: demo API now exposes runtime endpoint profiles to inspect calls, cache hits and latency metrics during load validation
